GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [custdist@1 DESC, c_count@0 DESC]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_count], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_count@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_count], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuProjectExec
                GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[c_custkey], aggr=[count(orders.o_orderkey)]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                    GpuHashJoinExec
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=33554432
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=33554432
                            GpuFilterExec
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=33554432
--- memory ---
total_cost=592
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
  GpuSortExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=16, cost=24
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=8, cost=24
                GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=24, output_bytes=16, cost=40
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, input_bytes=8, output_bytes=8, cost=16
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=8, cost=8
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=16, output_bytes=16, cost=32
                            GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=16, cost=64
                              GpuScanExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=48, cost=48
